content.cn_text: 你将听到导游介绍爱尔兰的纽格兰奇通道墓。
content.en_text: You will hear a tour guide talking about the Newgrange passage tomb in Ireland.

content.cn_text: 在播放录音之前，你有些时间阅读问题11-16。
content.en_text: First you have some time to look at questions 11-16.

content.cn_text: (暂停录音30秒)
content.en_text: (Pause the recording for 30 seconds)

content.cn_text: 现在仔细听录音，回答问题十一至问题十六。
content.en_text: Now listen carefully and answer questions 11 to 16.

content.cn_text: 早上好，欢迎来到Brú na Bóinne游客中心。
content.en_text: Good morning, and welcome to the Brú na Bóinne Visitor Centre.

content.cn_text: 纽格兰奇不仅在爱尔兰，而且在西欧，都是这种被称为通道墓的结构的最好的例子之一。
content.en_text: Newgrange is one of the finest examples, not only in Ireland, but in Western Europe, of the type of structure known as a passage tomb.

content.cn_text: 它可能建于公元前3000年左右，比埃及吉萨金字塔早500年左右，比埃及金字塔早1000年
content.en_text: It was probably built about 3000 BC - that makes it around 500 years older than the pyramid at Giza, in Egypt, and 1000 years older than

content.cn_text: 英国的巨石阵!
content.en_text: Stonehenge in England!

content.cn_text: 在我们开始参观之前，让我告诉你们一些你们将要看到的东西。
content.en_text: Before we start our tour, let me tell you a little bit about what you'll be seeing.

content.cn_text: 新庄园由一条狭长的通道和一个房间组成，如果我们想象从上面往下看，它的形状会是一个十字架。
content.en_text: Newgrange consists of a long narrow passage and chamber, which, if we imagine looking down on it from above, would have the shape of a cross.

content.cn_text: 在形成十字架手臂的墓室的两个房间里，你会看到个大石盆，这是许多旧石器时代爱尔兰坟墓的特征，尽管研究人员只能猜测它们的用途。
content.en_text: In the two rooms of the chamber forming the arms of the cross, you will see  large stone basins, which are a feature of many Palaeolithic Irish tombs, though researchers can only guess about what their purpose would have been.

content.cn_text: 在坟墓外面，在通道入口的前面，坐落着一块巨大的雕刻的入口石，我相信你们都在杂志或教科书上看到过它的图片。
content.en_text: Outside of the tomb, in front of the entrance to the passage, sits the large carved entrance stone, which I'm sure you've all seen pictures of in magazines or textbooks.

content.cn_text: 毕竟，这块石头是整个旧石器时代岩石艺术中最著名的例子。
content.en_text: After all, this stone is about the most famous example in the entire repertory of Palaeolithic rock art.

content.cn_text: 覆盖着它的螺旋和之字形线条非常美丽。
content.en_text: The spirals and zigzag lines covering it are strikingly beautiful.

content.cn_text: 通道内侧的一些大型路沿石也进行了装饰，尽管它们没有那么出名。
content.en_text: Some of the large kerbstones lining the inside of the passage are also decorated, although they're not as famous.

content.cn_text: 一个11米高的圆形石丘覆盖着陵墓，使它看起来比它更大，更壮观，尤其是从远处看。
content.en_text: An eleven-metre-high circular mound made of stones covers the tomb, making it appear even larger and more imposing than it is, especially from a distance.

content.cn_text: 在我们出发之前，我想提的最后一件事是灯箱，这是一个开口，你会在通道的屋顶上看到，在入口上方，它允许太阳的光线进入并在冬至日日出时照亮坟墓。
content.en_text: The final thing I want to mention before we set off is the light box, which is an opening that you will see in the roof of the passage, above the entrance, which allows the light of the sun to enter and illuminate the tomb at sunrise on the day of the winter solstice.

content.cn_text: 在听剩下的录音之前，你有些时间看看问题17-20。
content.en_text: Before you hear the rest of the talk, you have some time to look at questions 17-20.

content.cn_text: (暂停录音30秒)
content.en_text: (Pause the recording for 30 seconds)

content.cn_text: 现在听录音，回答问题17-20。
content.en_text: Now listen and answer questions 17-20.

content.cn_text: 事实上，我想告诉你更多关于纽格兰奇冬至的事。
content.en_text: Actually, I want to tell you a bit more about the winter solstice at Newgrange.

content.cn_text: 坟墓与冬至日出的对齐无疑是纽格兰奇最令人惊叹的特征之一，这使得研究人员推测，这个地方可能不仅仅是一个埋葬的地方，而且可能具有更广泛的文化重要性，作为一个具有精神或科学意义的地方。
content.en_text: The alignment of the tomb to the winter solstice sunrise is without a doubt one of the most amazing features of Newgrange, and has led researchers to speculate that the site may not have been only a place of burial but may have had broader cultural importance as a place of spiritual or scientific significance.

content.cn_text: 的确，目睹冬至日出照亮坟墓是令人叹为观止的，至今仍与人们产生深刻的共鸣。
content.en_text: Indeed, to witness the winter solstice sunrise illuminate the tomb is breathtaking and still has a deep resonance with people today.

content.cn_text: 欢迎公众在夏至前后的早晨聚集在纽格兰奇观看日出，但在夏至的早晨，进入房间本身是有限的，并通过抽签提前决定。
content.en_text: The general public are welcome to gather at Newgrange for the sunrise on the morning around the Solstice, but access to the chamber itself is limited on the Solstice mornings, and is decided in advance by  lottery.

content.cn_text: 事实证明，它非常受欢迎;去年有25,349人参加了夏至彩票的50个名额。
content.en_text: It's proved to be extremely popular;last year there were 25,349 entries for the Solstice lottery's 50 places.

content.cn_text: 但不要绝望——近年来，英国公共工程办公室(Office of Public Works)通过互联网和电视台向全球数十万人直播了这一盛事。
content.en_text: But don't despair -in recent years the event has been transmitted live by the Office of Public Works to hundreds of thousands of people around the world via internet and television stations.

content.cn_text: 今年的抽签将于9月30日举行，获奖者将于10月中旬收到通知。
content.en_text: This year's draw will take place on September 30th, and the winning applicants will be notified by mid- October.

content.cn_text: 为了确保一切公平公正，当地三所学校的孩子们将选出获胜的申请者。
content.en_text: To ensure that everything is fair and square, children from three local schools will choose the winning applicants.

content.cn_text: 将抽出50个名字，每个幸运的获胜者都可以带一位客人。
content.en_text: Fifty names will be drawn, and each of the lucky winners can bring a guest.

content.cn_text: 当然，一百个人也挤不下一座坟墓;在冬至前后的五个早晨，我们的房间里有十个彩票中奖者和他们的客人。
content.en_text: But of course, one hundred people won't fit in the tomb; we have room for ten lottery winners and their guests in the chamber on each of the five mornings around the Winter Solstice.

content.cn_text: 如果你有兴趣报名，你可以在出去的时候到服务台报名。
content.en_text: If you're interested in signing up, you can do so at the information desk on your way out.

content.cn_text: 第二部分到此结束。
content.en_text: That is the end of Part two.

content.cn_text: 你现在有半分钟的时间检查答案。
content.en_text: You now have half a minute to check your answers.

content.cn_text: (暂停录音30秒)
content.en_text: (Pause the recording for 30 seconds)

groups.desc:
Questions 11-16
Label the diagram below.
Choose SIX answers from the box and write the correct letter, A-H, next to questions 11-16.

items.analysis: 第11题的位置在图示中标示为通道的部分。听力原文中明确提到“Newgrange consists of a long narrow passage”，这与图示中的位置相符，因此答案是B. passage。
因为原文提到“chamber”这个房间，它的形状像一个十字，结合图片和12号位置的形状，确定答案是H. chamber rooms。
根据听力原文，题目所示13的位置是在墓室的一个房间内，并且明确提到“两个房间”的特点是有“大石盆”。结合图片和文字描述，可以确定答案是 C. stone basin。
文中明确提到在“墓室外面，在通道入口前”的位置，有一块“雕刻的入口石”，与第14题所示位置相符，因此正确答案为D（entrance stone）。
听力原文中清楚地描述了“entrance”这个词以及其前面的地理位置。听力材料中提到了“大型雕刻入口石”位于通道入口前面，根据图片推断出15位置对应的是"entrance"（入口）。因此，正确答案是"F. entrance"。
因为原文中明确提到“light box”位于“roof of the passage”，并且描述了其功能和位置，所以答案是E. light box。

groups.desc:
Questions 17-20
Complete the sentences below.
Write ONLY ONE WORD for each answer.
groups.collect:
The Winter Solstice at Newgrange
Anyone may join the gathering of people at Newgrange for the Solstiec sunrise; however, access to the chamber itself is $14346$
Access to the chamber is decided in advance by $14347$
The winners of the draw will be notified by the middle of $14348$
Bach winner may bring a $14349$

items.analysis: 这道题的关键在于准确理解题干要求和原文含义。题目询问的是进入墓室的情况，而原文中明确指出"access to the chamber itself is limited"。这里的"limited"就是我们需要填写的答案。之所以选择"limited"而不是其他词，是因为它直接描述了进入墓室的状态。虽然原文中还提到了"decided"和"lottery"，但这些词描述的是决定进入方式的过程，而不是进入本身的状态。此外，"limited"与题干中的"may join the gathering ... however"形成了对比，更加符合语境。所以，正确答案是"limited"。

这道题的答案是"lottery"（抽签），因为文中明确指出进入墓室的机会是通过提前抽签决定的。题目中的关键词"access to the chamber"和"decided in advance"在原文中都有对应，这些词帮助我们定位到包含答案的句子。文中说"access to the chamber itself is limited on the Solstice mornings, and is decided in advance by lottery"，这里的"lottery"就是我们要填的答案。选择"lottery"作为答案是因为它直接回答了题目中"如何决定进入权"的问题。记住，在这类填空题中，我们需要准确捕捉问题所问的具体信息，而不是被周围的其他细节所干扰。例如，虽然文中提到access是"limited"（有限的），但这并不是题目所问的决定方式，所以不能作为答案。

这道题的关键在于准确理解时间信息和事件顺序。文中提到抽签在9月30日进行，但获胜者将在10月中旬被通知。题目明确要求填写通知时间，而不是抽签时间。"mid-October"中的"mid-"对应题干中的"middle"，因此正确答案是"October"。注意区分不同事件的时间点是解答此类题目的关键。另外，"winning applicants"和"notified"是重要的信号词，帮助我们定位到相关信息。在听力考试中，要特别留意与时间相关的表达，尤其是在听到关键词如"notified"或"informed"时。

这道题的答案是"guest"，因为原文中明确说明每个幸运的获奖者可以带一位客人（guest）。题目中的定位词"winner"和"bring"在原文中直接出现，帮助我们定位到答案句。"guest"是唯一符合题目要求的单词，既符合语境，又满足"一个词"的要求。记住，在填空题中，我们需要严格按照原文的表述填写答案，不要随意改变词形或使用同义词。在这个例子中，"guest"正是原文中使用的确切词语，因此是最佳答案。
